verses.text: Asa' uk a kum sawmthumlegukna kumin Judah a simin Israel kumpipa Baasha paito a, Judah kumpipa Asa kiang panin kuamah a paikhiat theihlohna ding leh ama kiangah kuamah a pai theihlohna dingin Ramah khua a phut hi
Tua ahih ciangin Asa in Topa' biakinn leh kumpipa' inn-a vanmanpha koihnate panin ngun leh kham la-in, Damaskas-ah a teng Syria kumpipa Benhadad kiangah tuate puakin

“Ka pa leh na pa a kipawl mah bangin kei leh nang i kipawl hi. Tu-in ngun leh kham kong puak hi. Kei kiang panin amah a nungkik theihna dingin pai in la Israel kumpipa Baasha tawh na kipawlna va sutat in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Benhadad in Kumpi Asa' thu ngai-in Israel khuapite a sim dingin a galkap ukte sawl a, amaute in Ijon, Dan, Abelmaim, leh Naftali vankoihna khuapite a zo uh hi
Baasha in tua thu a zak ciangin Ramah khua a lam khawl a, a nasep a tawpsak hi
Tua ciangin Kumpi Asa in Judah mi khempeuh khawmin thu pia a, Baasha in lamna-a a zat Ramah suang leh a singte amaute in puakhia uh a, tuate tawh Geba leh Mizpah a lam uh hi

Tua hun laitakin Judah kumpi Asa kiangah thumupa Hanani hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Nangmah in Syria kumpipa suangin, Topa na Pasian suanglo na hih manin, Syria kumpipa' galkapte in nang hong suaktasak hi
Ethiopia mite leh Libya mite pen leeng tampi tak leh sakol tung tuang tampi tak tawh a om galkap tampi hilo ahi hiam? Ahi zongin Topa suang na hih manin amah in na khutsungah amaute hong pia hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh ama lamah a lungsim a paubaanglo mite' tangin ama vangliatna a lak dingin Topa' mit in leitung khempeuh en kawikawi hi. Hih thu-ah na hai gamtat khin hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tu-a kipan gal na do ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin thumupa tungah Asa heh a, amah kol bulhin thong sungah a koih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu hangin ama tungah nakpi takin heh hi. Tua hun mahin Asa in mi pawlkhat zong gitlohna tawh a gimsak hi
Asa' gamtatnate, a patna pan a tawpna dong, Judah leh Israel Kumpite' Tangthu sungah kigelh hi
Ama uk a kum sawmthumlekuana kumin Asa in a khe-ah natna nei a, a natna nasia mahmah hi. Ahi zongin ama nat hun nangawnah amah in Topa zonglo a, zato siamte' huhna a zong hi
Tua ahih ciangin Asa si a, ama uk a kum sawmlilekhatna kumin a bei ahi hi

David khuapi sungah amahmah in a khuak han sungah amaute in a vui uh hi. Paknamtui bawl siamte in a bawl a namtui a nam tuamtuamte tawh a kidim hankuang sungah amah a sial uh hi. Tua ciangin amah zahtakna-in amaute in meiphual lian mahmah khat a cih uh hi.
